titleStmt.title: SII 22.30: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 30. (A.R. No. 30 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUKKAḌAIYŪR. AMṚITAGHAṬĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. VIKRAMA-CHŌḶA—6th YEAR, (A.D. 1123—24)

summary.p: The inscription begins with the introduction Pūmālai miḍaindu etc., The continuation after 1. 18 is inaccessible, and hence the purport of the record is not known. It stops with the mention of the details of date viz. Vriśchika [śu. 1], Wednesday, Mṛigaśiras and of the temple of Kālakāladēvar at “Paḍai-ēviya”. Tirukkaḍavūr in Ambar-nāḍu a division of Rājanārāyaṇa-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmālai miṭaittu poṉmālai tikaḻtarap pāmālai malarṉta parumaṇit tiraḷpuyat tiruni
lamaṭantaiyoṭu jayamakaḷiruppa taṉvaraimārvaṉ tanatenap peṟṟu tirumakaḷ Orutani Iruppa ka
laimakaḷ coṟtiṟam puṇan=ta kaṟpinaḷāki viruppoṭu nāvakattiruppa ticai toṟum tikiriyo
ṭu ceṅkol naṭappa Akila puvanamum kavippator putumatipol veṇ kuṭaivimicai niḻaṟṟa
karuṅkali Oḷintu vanpilattiṭaik kiṭappa kuḷattiṭai teliṅkavimaṉ viyaṅkalmicai yeṟavu
m kaliṅkar pūmiyaik kanaleri parukavum Aimpaṭaiparuvattu vempaṭai tāṅki veṅkaima
ṇṭalat tāṅki nitiruntu vaṭaticai vaṭippaṭuttaruḷi teṉticait tarumamum tavamum tānamum taḻai
ppa vetamum mey meyum Ātiyukampol talaittalai ciṟappa van=taruḷi veṟkaru por pu
liyāṉai pārtthivar cūṭa niṟaimaṇi makuṭam muṟaimayil cūṭi maṉṉuyiṟ kellām Iṉnuyar tāypol
nan=taḷi parappi tanittani parantu maṉamuḻutuṅ kaḷippa manuneṟivaḷarttu taṉ koyil koṟṟavācal puṟattu maṇināvoṭuṅ
ka muraicukaḷ muḻaṅka vijayamum pukaḻu melmel poṅka ceḻiyar veñ curam puka ceralar kaṭalpuka Aḻitaru ciṅka
ḷar Añci neñcalamara kaṅkar tiṟaiyiṭak kannaṭar venniṭa koṅkar Otuṅka koṅkaṇar cāya maṟṟetticai mannarum ta
n=tamakkaraṇeṉa tirumalarcevaṭi tollai yeḻulakum toḻuteḻat toṉṟi mullaivā
ṇkai mukkokkiḻānaṭi Umaiyoṭu caṅkaraṉ Imayac camaittirun=tana reṉap porun=ti Uṭaniruppa Aṅkavaṉ makuḻum kaṅkai O
ppākiya terivayar tilatam tiyākav(ā)tākai purikuḻal maṭappiṭi punita kuṇavanitai tiripuvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷ Ivan=tiruviḷattaruḷ muḻutuṭai
yāḷena cempoṉ virasiṅhāsanattu mukkokkiḻā ṟirun=taruḷiya kopparakecaripanmarāna tribhuvanaccakravatti
kaḷ śrīvikramacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 6- Āṟāvatu vṛścika maiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa mṛgaśirṣattu nāḷ rāja
nārāyaṇavaḷanāṭṭu Amparnāṭuḷpaṭa meviya tirukkaṭavūr ṭai yār śrīkālakāladevar koyilil tiricciṟṟampala veḷāContinuation inaccessible.
Digital edition of SII 22.30 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
